mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_ticket (trainer_id, member_id, total_count, remaining_count, start_date, end_date, is_active) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{memberId}, #{totalCount}, #{remainingCount}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{isActive})
mapper.select: SELECT t.ticket_id, t.trainer_id, tr.name AS trainer_name, t.member_id, m.name AS member_name, t.total_count, t.remaining_count, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.is_active, t.created_at FROM pt_ticket t INNER JOIN member tr ON t.trainer_id = tr.member_id INNER JOIN member m ON t.member_id = m.member_id WHERE t.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY t.is_active DESC, t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.ticket_id, t.trainer_id, tr.name AS trainer_name, t.member_id, m.name AS member_name, t.total_count, t.remaining_count, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.is_active, t.created_at FROM pt_ticket t INNER JOIN member tr ON t.trainer_id = tr.member_id INNER JOIN member m ON t.member_id = m.member_id WHERE t.trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY t.is_active DESC, m.name, t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.ticket_id, t.trainer_id, tr.name AS trainer_name, t.member_id, m.name AS member_name, t.total_count, t.remaining_count, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.is_active, t.created_at FROM pt_ticket t INNER JOIN member tr ON t.trainer_id = tr.member_id INNER JOIN member m ON t.member_id = m.member_id WHERE t.member_id = #{memberId} AND t.trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY t.is_active DESC, t.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM pt_ticket WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND is_active = TRUE AND remaining_count > 0 ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_ticket SET remaining_count = remaining_count - 1, is_active = CASE WHEN remaining_count - 1 = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE is_active END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND remaining_count > 0 AND is_active = TRUE
UPDATE pt_ticket SET is_active = FALSE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
